29.reason: [The function does not check if p->left is NULL before recursing, which can cause a segmentation fault when accessing p->left->left or p->left->right in the next call. Similarly for p->right.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The function does not check if p->left is NULL before recursing, which can cause a segmentation fault when accessing p->left->left or p->left->right in the next call. Similarly for p->right.]

30.reason: [Same issue: no NULL check before recursion leads to undefined behavior on empty subtrees.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Same issue: no NULL check before recursion leads to undefined behavior on empty subtrees.]

42.reason: [If the input n is 0, root will be NULL, and calling search(root) will dereference a NULL pointer in the first line of search(), causing a crash.]
